incidents.title: Database connection pool exhaustion caused 15min outage
incidents.root_cause: Increased pool size without checking DB server capacity. Hit max_connections limit.
incidents.resolution: Emergency rollback of pool config, then proper capacity planning

incidents.title: PostgreSQL connection limit exceeded during traffic spike
incidents.root_cause: Multiple services sharing same DB increased connections simultaneously
incidents.resolution: Connection pooling at PgBouncer layer, enforced per-service limits

incidents.title: Notification delays during marketing campaign
incidents.root_cause: Connection pool too small, requests queued waiting for connections
incidents.resolution: Increased pool from 10 to 20 after load testing
